text: I spot the black tower through the rain.
A patrol turns the corner. Last chance to signal Mara.
巡逻兵转过街角。现在还能叫玛拉。
About time. I brought the patrol schedule, and yes, I borrowed it permanently.
你终于来了。我带了巡逻排班表，当然，是借了就不还的那种。
Tell me why you came before I decide how much trouble this is worth.
先告诉我你为什么来，我再决定这趟麻烦值不值得。
Three routes: market, forest, city gate.
The broker taps a silver badge on her cup.
The broker takes the schedule and slides over the badge.
掮客收下排班表，推来徽章。
The broker smiles. Then every market bell screams.
掮客笑了。接着集市警铃全响。
A flooded bridge blocks the path. A shrine glows nearby.
水淹的桥挡路。旁边神龛发光。
I know this oath. Keep watch while I read it.
这段誓词我认得。你盯着周围，我来念。
Inside: a dry tower service badge.
里面是一枚干燥的高塔勤务徽章。
The guard wants a reason, a badge, or an excuse to leave.
守卫要理由、徽章，或者一个下班借口。
The guard stamps a pass and forgets your face.
守卫盖章，顺便忘了你的脸。
Bad bluff. He grabs the whistle.
The badge opens a narrow service road.
徽章打开一条勤务小路。
There! Boots thunder through the rain.
I dive into a laundry cart. Heroic? No. Effective? Yes.
我钻进洗衣车。英勇？不。管用？是。
Wrong way. Loud way. Very useful for us.
方向错，动静大。对我们很有用。
The bell rope waits. Pull right, save the city.
钟绳就在眼前。拉对了，城市得救。
I pull once. The city wakes before the guards do.
我拉下一次。城市比守卫先醒。
I have the gears jammed. Also, this helmet is mine now.
齿轮我卡住了。还有，这顶头盔现在归我。
Victory! The tower falls silent, the city cheers, and someone names a terrible pastry after you.
成功通关！高塔哑火，全城欢呼，还有人用你的名字命名了一种难吃点心。
The captain thanks you for delivering yourself.
队长感谢你主动送上门。
